technology.title: 93 Hilarious Examples Of "If It's Stupid But It Works, It Ain't Stupid"
technology.desc:
They say humans are resilient. But try telling me that the next time something breaks. My first instinct is to panic, not problem-solve.
Turns out, though, that in some corners of the internet, people are proving we’re not quite as helpless as many of our meltdowns might suggest. Often armed with little more than duct tape and what can only be described as unshakable confidence, these self-appointed MacGyvers have been solving the kind of small, everyday hiccups that would send most of us into a tailspin.
Their fixes look ridiculous. Yet they also somehow work. Funny
